summary: Methylergometrine should avoid being used as treatment for PPH in individuals suffering from heart ailments because of potential adverse impacts related to heightened myocardial load; alternatives such as oxytocin provide effective yet safe management strategies suitable across various healthcare environments. \boxed{\text{methylergometrine}}
